description.value:
A noble Cornovii who rejected him and married Lupis. Currently a guest at the farm with his four warrior kinsmen (Ardar, Iucharba, Dowan, Adwen), supposedly to celebrate Samhain. He harbors resentment toward Lupis and seeks to undermine the marriage. Not directly responsible for the sprite attacks, but contributes to the chaos by causing trouble.

Role: antagonist/neutral | Occupation: Cornovii noble, spurned suitor

STR
